docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS AS TO DEFENDANT BIELECKI, CARISA

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: NO ANSWER AT THE TIME OF SERVICE. THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS AS TO DEFENDANT BIELECKI, CARISA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,847.11 FILED BY INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS AS TO DEFENDANT BIELECKI, CARISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REMARK: RECEIVED RETURNED MAILED FROM THE POST OFFICE. CERTIFIED MAIL WITH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO CARISA BIELECKI. RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANTONIO PALAZZO FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIELECKI, CARISA $2,847.11 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,972.11, PAYMENT OF $2,972.11 SHALL BE MADE ON OR BEFORE NOVEMBER 10, 2025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-08-2025 BY JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG. PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS IS PRESENT BY ANTONIO PALAZZO. DEFENDANT CARISA BIELECKI IS PRESENT AND IS SERVED AND READY TO PROCEED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.
